scripts.build:slides:durable-execution: cd slides/durable-execution && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm exec slidev build --base /talks/durable-execution/ --out ../../public/talks/durable-execution
scripts.build:slides:consistency-models: cd slides/consistency-models && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm exec slidev build --base /talks/consistency-models/ --out ../../public/talks/consistency-models
scripts.build:slides:durable-execution:pdf: cd slides/durable-execution && pnpm exec slidev export --output ../../public/talks/durable-execution/durable-execution-talk.pdf
scripts.build:slides:consistency-models:pdf: cd slides/consistency-models && pnpm exec slidev export --output ../../public/talks/consistency-models/consistency-models-talk.pdf
